message:
feat: implement OpenAI Chat Completions provider

- Add OpenAIProvider struct implementing Provider trait
- Support streaming SSE responses with tool use
- Handle OpenAI's message format (system/user/assistant/tool roles)
- Convert tool definitions to OpenAI function calling format
- Support custom base URLs for Azure, Groq, and other compatible APIs
- Add 3 unit tests for message conversion, tool conversion, provider info
- Update FEATURE_PARITY.md to reflect OpenAI provider status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
